observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with weaving fault
Visual pattern suggesting fabric interior defect
Localized deviation from normal zipper appearance
mechanism_explanation: Loom malfunction or thread tension error during the weaving process.
defect_region: along the zipper teeth or fabric
severity_visual_description: moderate fabric interior defect visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Recalibrate loom and replace worn thread guides.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the fabric interior defect would be absent and surface appears normal.
